title: Saudian Arabian Glowing Skewers
description: A flavorful and healthy dish originating from Saudi Arabia. Marinated meat is grilled to perfection, served with a side of crunchy vegetables.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together glowing olive oil, salt, and a pinch of black pepper.
2. Add the night arabian meat to the bowl and mix well to coat.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
4. Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
5. Thread the marinated meat onto the grill skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
6. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
7. Meanwhile, brush the mid onion with glowing olive oil and grill for 2-3 minutes per side, or until caramelized.
8. Serve the grilled skewers with the grilled mid onion and crumbled reggiano and parmigiano cheese.
